negative_evidence.query: game theory ontology OR game theory OWL OR game theory RDF registry repository
negative_evidence.rationale: Targeted searches across registries, repositories, and documentation surfaces found no additional relevant ontology or formalism to include for this route.
negative_evidence.surface: Game-theory ontology registry and repository sweep

artefact.inclusion_rationale: These GDL variants are relevant for imperfect information, epistemic, and extended game-description constructs that may expose UOGTO gaps.
artefact.limitations: Likely literature-only until a stable public specification artifact is acquired.

reviewer_handoff.next_action: Decide whether imperfect-information and epistemic constructs require UOGTO additions or external alignment only.

literature_only.name: GDL-II, GDL-III, and GDLZ variants
literature_only.rationale: These GDL variants are relevant for imperfect information, epistemic, and extended game-description constructs that may expose UOGTO gaps.

artefact.inclusion_rationale: GDL captures game rules, legal moves, states, roles, goals, and terminal conditions that overlap UOGTO game specification semantics.
artefact.limitations: Use metadata/literature unless a redistributable grammar or corpus is explicitly acquired later.

reviewer_handoff.next_action: Chart GDL constructs against UOGTO rules, actions, terminal states, and payoff/outcome terms.

literature_only.name: Stanford Game Description Language
literature_only.rationale: GDL captures game rules, legal moves, states, roles, goals, and terminal conditions that overlap UOGTO game specification semantics.

reviewer_handoff.next_action: Preserve as Phase 2 baseline and update only by appending new evidence records.

structured_non_rdf.name: CellML

structured_non_rdf.name: Systems Biology Markup Language
